% Ledger Journal header for Pandoc → PDF
% Single-column, Times font, specific Ledger margins and heading styles

\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage{times}
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage{caption}
\usepackage{scrextend}
\usepackage{setspace}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{bookmark}

% Note: geometry is set via paper.yaml → build.sh, not here.
% If you need to override, uncomment and adjust:
% \usepackage{geometry}
% \geometry{a4paper, left=3.1cm, right=3.1cm, top=2.4cm, bottom=1.0cm}

% 11.5pt body text
\changefontsizes{11.5pt}
\setstretch{1.0}
\setlength{\parindent}{0.6cm}

% Page headers/footers
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0pt}

% Customise these per submission:
\fancyhead[L]{\fontsize{8pt}{10pt}\selectfont ledgerjournal.org}
\fancyhead[R]{\fontsize{8pt}{10pt}\selectfont ISSN 2379-5980 (online)}
\fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}

% Section headings
\titleformat{\section}{\fontsize{13pt}{15.6pt}\bfseries\filcenter}{\thesection.}{0.5em}{}
\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{15pt}{7pt}

\titleformat{\subsection}[runin]{\fontsize{11.5pt}{13.8pt}\itshape}{\thesubsection.}{0.5em}{}[---]
\titlespacing*{\subsection}{0.6cm}{13.5pt}{1em}

% Captions
\captionsetup{
  font={small},
  labelfont={bf},
  singlelinecheck=false,
  margin=1.2cm
}

\hypersetup{
    unicode=true,
    breaklinks=true,
    colorlinks=true,
    linkcolor=black,
    citecolor=black,
    urlcolor=blue
}
